creator: joerg@FreeBSD.org
text:
hunspell appears to be a mandatory prerequisite of editors/libreoffice.

As such, it is misfiled in category "hungarian"; instead, it should become
part of the "textproc" category.

How-To-Repeat: Don't install all the national language ports in /usr/ports you are not
interested in, and try building editors/libreoffice.  (Not installing
languages you don't understand anyway makes updating the /usr/ports
hierarchy a lot faster.)
